nasb.text: But charge Joshua and encourage him and strengthen him, for he shall go across at the head of this people, and he will give them as an inheritance the land which you will see.’

esv.text: But charge Joshua, and encourage and strengthen him, for he shall go over at the head of this people, and he shall put them in possession of the land that you shall see.’

cnv.text: 你卻要吩咐約書亞，堅固他，鼓勵他，因為他要在這人民前面過河去，使他們承受你看見的這地。’

ccb.text: 你要委任约书亚，勉励他，支持他，因为他必带领以色列人过河，占领你眺望的那片土地。’
